server/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13.
Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
server/pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 21; without this change, the build would target Java 17, potentially missing out on Java 21 features or failing if strict source/target checks are enforced by the new Spring Boot version.

server/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Cloud version to 2023.0.6 for compatibility with the new Spring Boot version.
